rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RICHARD REASOR EMMONS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: continued to december 4, 2017. no proof of proper service (with the mandatory language in PC section 12201) for the Report on Status of Administration on file as of this date. A proof of service for a Petition for Final Distribution was filed, but no petition was filed and the POS listed 11/20 as the hearing date, which is only the hearing date for the Petition to Approve Status of Administration. An appearance will be required on 12/4 if one of the following two things does not happen: either a proper POS for the Petition to Approve Status of Administration is filed; OR a Petition for Final Distribution is filed. NOTE-->the Petition for Final Distribution will get a new hearing date. It should NOT be filed showing 12/4 as its hearing date or it will be rejected.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CLARENCE HANKINS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Validity Of The Will Of Clarence Hankins And To Revoke Probate Of The Purported Will
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/4/17. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of all electronically filed documents requiring Court review or action needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T]. Filed stamped copy of the Petition and of the Objection must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 5 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order.
